name: Gravitational Force Calculator
seo_description: Calculate gravitational force between masses. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
example_label: Calculate force between 100kg and 200kg at 2m distance.

range_hints.m1: Common weight range for this calculation.
range_hints.m2: Common weight range for this calculation.

result_context: The calculated result provid is the main output value.
steps: Calculate and display the force result
mistakes: Not verifying input values are within realistic ranges for your scenario
Entering zero or negative values where positive numbers are required
Rounding intermediate results too early in multi-step calculations
desc: Free online gravitational force calculator. Enter mass 1 and mass 2 to get instant results.
